headline: Sage × Barclays embedded-finance partnership in UK; pressure on QBO Money/Bill Pay.
why_it_moved: Quiet week — score holds at neutral baseline.

competitors.headline: Sage and Barclays launch strategic partnership integrating banking + accounting for UK SMBs
competitors.summary: Sage and Barclays entered a strategic partnership to integrate banking and accounting services for UK small businesses — embedded finance positioning aimed at MTD compliance and reducing administrative burden. Direct overlap with QuickBooks Money / Bill Pay roadmap in the UK.

regulatory.title: Spain Royal Decree formally adopts B2B e-invoicing mandate (24 March)
regulatory.summary: Royal Decree adopted on March 24, 2026: large companies compliant by July 1, 2027; all other businesses by mid-2028. Verifactu real-time reporting already mandatory for corporate taxpayers as of January 1, 2026.
